title: A Review - Thermal spraying on Polymers
authors: Niyati Lia
abstract: Polymer coatings are extensively used to enhance the surface performance of engineering components by imparting corrosion resistance, wear protection, hydrophobicity, biocompatibility, and various functional surface properties. Among the available deposition techniques, thermal spray technologies have emerged as versatile and efficient methods for producing polymer and polymer-based composite coatings on metallic, ceramic, and polymeric substrates. These processes enable the fabrication of thick, adherent coatings while minimizing substrate degradation and offering flexibility in material selection.This review presents a comprehensive overview of thermally sprayed polymer coatings, with emphasis on deposition processes, coating microstructure, mechanical and functional properties, and major application areas. It also discusses the characteristics and suitability of commonly employed polymers, including polyethylene (PE), polyamide (PA), polyimide (PI), polyurethane (PU), polyether ether ketone (PEEK), polyethylene terephthalate (PET), and fluoropolymers. Furthermore, the review critically examines the fabrication and performance of polymer and polymer-based composite coatings produced using various thermal spray techniques, such as flame spraying, high-velocity oxy-fuel (HVOF) spraying, plasma spraying (PS), and cold spraying (CS). The advantages, limitations, recent advancements, and future research directions of these techniques are also highlighted to provide a comprehensive understanding of their potential in advanced surface engineering applications.
venue: Zenodo (CERN European Organization for Nuclear Research)

infographic.key_insight: Thermal spraying is a versatile route to deposit thick, adherent polymer and polymer-composite coatings that improve corrosion, wear, hydrophobic, and biocompatible surface performance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The review is relevant for selecting coating processes and polymer families for surface engineering on metallic, ceramic, and polymer substrates.
method: Compares flame spraying, HVOF, plasma spraying, and cold spraying for polymer deposition.
Summarizes coating microstructure, mechanical behavior, and functional properties.
Reviews common polymers such as PE, PA, PI, PU, PEEK, PET, and fluoropolymers.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract describes a literature review that synthesizes prior findings on process suitability, coating properties, and application performance rather than reporting new experimental data.
infographic.watch_item: Polymer thermal spraying must be chosen carefully because process heat and particle state can still degrade polymers or limit adhesion on sensitive substrates.
infographic.paper_title: A Review - Thermal spraying on Polymers

zh-Hans.title: 聚合物热喷涂综述
zh-Hans.abstract: 聚合物涂层被广泛用于通过赋予耐腐蚀性、耐磨保护、疏水性、生物相容性以及多种功能性表面特性来提升工程部件的表面性能。在现有的沉积技术中，热喷涂技术已成为一种通用且高效的方法，可在金属、陶瓷和聚合物基底上制备聚合物及聚合物基复合涂层。这些工艺能够在尽量减少基底劣化的同时实现厚而具有良好附着力的涂层制备，并在材料选择方面提供灵活性。本文综述了热喷涂聚合物涂层的全面概况，重点关注沉积过程、涂层微观结构、力学与功能特性以及主要应用领域。文中还讨论了常用聚合物的特性及其适用性，包括聚乙烯（PE）、聚酰胺（PA）、聚酰亚胺（PI）、聚氨酯（PU）、聚醚醚酮（PEEK）、聚对苯二甲酸乙二醇酯（PET）和含氟聚合物。此外，本文对采用多种热喷涂技术制备的聚合物及聚合物基复合涂层的制备与性能进行了批判性分析，这些技术包括火焰喷涂、高速氧燃料（HVOF）喷涂、等离子喷涂（PS）和冷喷涂（CS）。文中还强调了这些技术的优势、局限性、最新进展以及未来研究方向，以便为先进表面工程应用中的潜力提供全面理解。

infographic.key_insight: 热喷涂是一种多用途途径，可沉积厚而具有良好附着力的聚合物及聚合物复合涂层，从而改善耐腐蚀、耐磨、疏水和生物相容等表面性能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该综述与在金属、陶瓷和聚合物基底上选择表面工程涂层工艺及聚合物体系密切相关。
method: 比较用于聚合物沉积的火焰喷涂、HVOF、等离子喷涂和冷喷涂。
总结涂层微观结构、力学行为和功能特性。
综述PE、PA、PI、PU、PEEK、PET和含氟聚合物等常见聚合物。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该摘要描述的是一篇文献综述，综合了先前关于工艺适用性、涂层性能和应用表现的研究结果，而非报告新的实验数据。
infographic.watch_item: 聚合物热喷涂必须谨慎选择，因为工艺热量和颗粒状态仍可能使聚合物降解，或限制其在敏感基底上的附着力。

method: Compares thermal spray routes for polymers: flame spraying, HVOF, plasma spraying, and cold spraying.
Reviews coating formation, microstructure, mechanical behavior, and functional performance.
Summarizes suitability of common polymers and polymer-based composites such as PE, PA, PI, PU, PEEK, PET, and fluoropolymers.

zh-Hans.title: 聚合物热喷涂综述
zh-Hans.abstract: 聚合物涂层被广泛用于通过赋予耐腐蚀性、耐磨保护、疏水性、生物相容性以及多种功能性表面特性来提升工程部件的表面性能。在现有沉积技术中，热喷涂技术已成为在金属、陶瓷和聚合物基体上制备聚合物及基于聚合物复合涂层的多功能且高效的方法。这些过程能够制备厚且具有良好附着力的涂层，同时尽量减少基体退化，并在材料选择方面提供灵活性。本文综述了热喷涂聚合物涂层的全面概况，重点介绍沉积工艺、涂层微观结构、力学与功能特性以及主要应用领域。文中还讨论了常用聚合物的特性及适用性，包括聚乙烯（PE）、聚酰胺（PA）、聚酰亚胺（PI）、聚氨酯（PU）、聚醚醚酮（PEEK）、聚对苯二甲酸乙二醇酯（PET）以及氟聚合物。此外，本文还系统评述了采用多种热喷涂技术制备的聚合物及基于聚合物复合涂层的制备与性能表现，例如火焰喷涂、高速氧燃料（HVOF）喷涂、等离子喷涂（PS）和冷喷涂（CS）。同时强调了这些技术的优势、局限性、最新进展以及未来研究方向，以便全面理解其在先进表面工程应用中的潜力。

infographic.key_insight: 热喷涂方法能够在多种基体上沉积厚的、具功能性的聚合物涂层，同时兼顾附着力、基体保护和定制化表面特性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该综述与面向表面工程中耐腐蚀、耐磨、疏水和生物相容应用的耐久、多功能防护涂层设计密切相关。
method: 比较聚合物热喷涂路线：火焰喷涂、HVOF、等离子喷涂和冷喷涂。
综述涂层形成、微观结构、力学行为和功能性能。
总结常见聚合物及其基于聚合物的复合材料的适用性，如 PE、PA、PI、PU、PEEK、PET 和氟聚合物。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该摘要表明这是一篇文献综述的综合，而非新的实验数据，评估了多种喷涂技术中已报道的工艺–结构–性能关系及应用结果。
infographic.watch_item: 聚合物热喷涂可能对热降解、附着控制以及工艺–材料相容性较为敏感，因此必须针对每一种聚合物/基体组合仔细优化参数。

title: Thermal-Mechanical Analysis of Residual Stress and Deformation in 6082 Aluminum Alloy Welded Joints
authors: Yingqi Cao
abstract: Welding residual stress and deformation have a significant impact on the welded structure and service performance of aluminum alloys. The three-dimensional temperature-displacement coupling of 6082 aluminum alloy butt welding joints was established by using ABAQUS software, and the residual stress distribution and deformation behavior during the welding process were studied. First, transient thermal analysis is conducted to obtain the temperature distribution during the welding process. Then, the obtained temperature field is introduced into mechanical analysis to evaluate the residual stress and structural deformation caused by welding. The results show that the temperature in the weld zone is the highest and gradually decreases towards the base material, with a distinct temperature gradient. During the thermal cycling process of welding, due to uneven thermal expansion and contraction, significant residual stress is concentrated in the weld seam and heat-affected zone. In addition, obvious deformation was observed near the welding area. The established numerical model provides a valuable basis for understanding the thermodynamic behavior of welded aluminum alloy structures and can offer references for the optimization of welding processes and structural design.

infographic.key_insight: A coupled thermal-mechanical ABAQUS model shows that welding heat creates steep temperature gradients that drive residual stress and deformation in 6082 aluminum butt joints.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The results help engineers predict weld-zone performance and guide welding-process optimization and structural design for aluminum alloys.
method: Built a 3D temperature-displacement coupled model in ABAQUS.
Ran transient thermal analysis to compute the welding temperature field.
Mapped the temperature field into mechanical analysis to estimate residual stress and deformation.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports a clear temperature gradient from weld zone to base material, with residual stress concentrated in the weld seam and heat-affected zone and visible deformation near the weld.
infographic.watch_item: The summary is based on numerical simulation only, so model accuracy depends on boundary conditions, material parameters, and validation against experiments.
infographic.paper_title: Thermal-Mechanical Analysis of Residual Stress and Deformation in 6082 Aluminum Alloy Welded Joints

zh-Hans.title: 6082铝合金焊接接头残余应力与变形的热-机械分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊接残余应力和变形会对铝合金焊接结构及服役性能产生显著影响。采用ABAQUS软件建立了6082铝合金对接焊接头的三维温度-位移耦合模型，并研究了焊接过程中残余应力分布与变形行为。首先进行瞬态热分析以获得焊接过程中的温度分布。然后，将所得温度场引入力学分析，用于评估焊接引起的残余应力和结构变形。结果表明，焊缝区域温度最高，并向母材方向逐渐降低，具有明显的温度梯度。在焊接热循环过程中，由于热胀冷缩不均匀，焊缝及热影响区内集中出现显著残余应力。此外，在焊接区域附近观察到明显变形。所建立的数值模型为理解焊接铝合金结构的热力学行为提供了有价值的基础，并可为焊接工艺优化和结构设计提供参考。

infographic.key_insight: 耦合热-机械ABAQUS模型表明，焊接热量会形成陡峭的温度梯度，从而驱动6082铝合金对接接头中的残余应力和变形。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该结果有助于工程师预测焊缝区域性能，并为铝合金的焊接工艺优化和结构设计提供指导。
method: 在ABAQUS中建立三维温度-位移耦合模型。
进行瞬态热分析以计算焊接温度场。
将温度场映射到力学分析中以估算残余应力和变形。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要显示，从焊缝区域到母材存在清晰的温度梯度，残余应力集中于焊缝和热影响区，且焊缝附近可见明显变形。
infographic.watch_item: 该总结仅基于数值模拟，因此模型准确性取决于边界条件、材料参数以及与实验结果的验证。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: High-velocity air-fuel (HVAF) spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that retain martensitic transformation and usable shape-memory behavior, which is rare for thermally sprayed NiTi.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables functional NiTi surface coatings for wear- and thermal-responsive components where conventional ceramic coatings cannot provide active actuation.
method: HVAF sprayed NiTi onto mild steel using four processing parameter sets.
Compared coating chemistry, porosity, microstructure, and phase transformation behavior.
Assessed functional response with bending, nanoindentation, and scratch tests after annealing.
infographic.evidence_signal: The coatings were 100–300 μm thick, adhered well to steel, and showed martensitic transformation plus thermal actuation and shape-memory effects in mechanical tests.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings had inhomogeneous microstructure, oxides, voids, dislocations, and internal stress, so annealing is needed and tensile strength remains limited.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：微观结构、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程构件表面沉积各种涂层以提高其在耐磨、耐腐蚀、减摩和热防护方面的性能，已是一项标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可能是硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层由于具有独特的功能性热机械特性而带来额外优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层一直很困难。标准电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最广泛使用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学成分不均匀且不发生马氏体转变的涂层，而冷喷NiTi涂层则存在与基体结合不良的问题。在本工作中，我们报道了首次成功制备出厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um），其既表现出功能性热机械特性，又与基体具有非常良好的附着力。我们采用高速度空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢上使用四组不同的工艺参数制备NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、微观结构、相变以及功能性热机械性能进行了评估。尽管涂层包含不均匀微观结构、空洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但它们在冷却和/或机械载荷作用下会发生马氏体转变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要退火后才能表现出功能性热机械特性。尽管其拉伸强度有限，这些涂层仍在三点弯曲试验中表现出热致驱动，并在纳米压痕和划痕试验中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: 高速空气燃料（HVAF）喷涂可制备较厚的NiTi涂层，使其保留马氏体转变和可用的形状记忆行为，这在热喷涂NiTi中较为罕见。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为耐磨和热响应部件提供了具有功能性的NiTi表面涂层，而传统陶瓷涂层无法提供主动驱动功能。
method: 采用HVAF工艺，在低碳钢上以四组工艺参数喷涂NiTi。
比较涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、微观结构和相变行为。
退火后通过弯曲、纳米压痕和划痕试验评估其功能响应。
infographic.evidence_signal: 这些涂层厚度为100–300 μm，与钢基体结合良好，并在机械测试中显示出马氏体转变以及热致驱动和形状记忆效应。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层具有不均匀微观结构、氧化物、空洞、位错和内应力，因此需要退火，且其拉伸强度仍然有限。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet combines physics-informed self-supervised learning with few-shot prototypical classification to predict laser weld penetration accurately from very limited labels.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical route to scalable, low-label quality control for intelligent laser welding automation in industrial settings.
method: Physics-informed neural network (PINN) guides feature learning from unlabeled molten-pool/keyhole images.
Contrastive self-supervised learning uses three image augmentation tasks to improve representation robustness.
Prototypical networks classify penetration state from only a small labeled set.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports 96.06% classification accuracy using only 200 labeled images, about 5% of the labeled dataset, and performance comparable to fully supervised methods.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and representativeness of the unlabeled image pool and the transferability of the learned features to different welding setups.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 基于物理信息神经网络的自监督学习激光焊接过程焊透预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全焊透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测焊透状态对于保证焊缝质量至关重要。为此，本文提出 SimPhysNet，一种新型算法，仅使用少量有标注图像即可在激光焊接焊透预测中实现较高的分类准确率。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性，因为这类算法在工业应用中受制于对大量高质量标注数据的依赖。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，它将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架中。通过引入物理信息神经网络（PINN），模型在大量无标注数据上被引导去提取熔池和小孔的物理有意义特征，而三种图像增强任务进一步提升了其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的少样本学习策略通过从极少量有标注图像构建类别表示，实现了稳健分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张有标注图像（约占全部标注数据集的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类准确率，这与使用全部标注数据集的传统监督学习算法的性能相当。本文提出了一种新的、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能自动化提供了途径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 将物理信息自监督学习与少样本原型分类相结合，仅依赖极少量标签即可准确预测激光焊缝焊透状态。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为工业场景中的智能激光焊接自动化提供了一条可扩展、低标注成本的质量控制实用路径。
method: 物理信息神经网络（PINN）引导从无标注熔池/小孔图像中学习特征。
对比式自监督学习使用三种图像增强任务提升表征鲁棒性。
原型网络仅凭少量有标注样本对焊透状态进行分类。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，仅使用 200 张有标注图像（约占有标注数据集的 5%）即可实现 96.06% 的分类准确率，且性能可与完全监督方法相媲美。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于无标注图像池的质量与代表性，以及所学特征对不同焊接设置的可迁移性。

title: Analysis of the Influence of Laser Welding Parameters on the Quality of the Lap Joint
authors: Z. Saternus, W. Piekarska, Tomasz Domański, Ján Vavro, M. Kubiak, Pavol Čerňava
abstract: The analysis presented focuses on the relationship between laser welding parameters and the strength properties of lap joints. The objective of the research was to design a numerical model for estimating the strength properties of lap joints welded by laser beam. As part of the work, experimental tests were carried out and then numerical simulations were performed. Experimental tests were performed for a lap joint welded using two different welding depths. A joint with full and partial penetration of materials was obtained. The material used for the lap joint is two flat bars with dimensions of 100x200x2 [mm] made of X5CrNi18-10 austenitic steel. Mechanical strength measurements and macroscopic studies were performed to identify the properties of the lap joint. To identify the properties of the lap joint, mechanical strength tests and macroscopic examinations were conducted. Based on experimental studies, discrete models of the analyzed lap joints were developed in the Abaqus FEM program. Simulation calculations of the laser welding process were performed. The obtained simulation results were input data for further numerical strength analysis. To validate the numerical models, the results obtained were compared with experimental data.

infographic.key_insight: Laser welding depth strongly affects lap-joint strength, so a calibrated FEM model can predict joint quality from process parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study supports process design for laser-welded stainless-steel lap joints by linking weld penetration, measured strength, and simulation-based prediction.
method: Built lap-joint specimens from X5CrNi18-10 steel sheets (100×200×2 mm).
Performed laser welding at two penetration levels: full and partial penetration.
Measured mechanical strength and examined weld macrostucture, then created Abaqus FEM discrete models and validated them against experiments.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports experimental strength tests and macroscopic examinations on full- and partial-penetration joints, followed by numerical simulation results compared directly with experimental data for validation.
infographic.watch_item: The model is validated only on two welding-depth cases for a specific stainless-steel lap joint, so broader applicability to other geometries, materials, or parameter ranges needs further confirmation.
infographic.paper_title: Analysis of the Influence of Laser Welding Parameters on the Quality of the Lap Joint

zh-Hans.title: 激光焊接参数对搭接接头质量影响的分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 所 प्रस्तुत的分析聚焦于激光焊接参数与搭接接头强度性能之间的关系。研究的目标是建立一个用于估算激光束焊接搭接接头强度性能的数值模型。作为研究的一部分，开展了实验测试，并随后进行了数值模拟。实验测试针对采用两种不同焊接深度焊接的搭接接头进行。获得了材料完全熔透和部分熔透的接头。用于搭接接头的材料为两块尺寸为 100x200x2 [mm] 的平板，材料为 X5CrNi18-10 奥氏体钢。为识别搭接接头的性能，进行了机械强度测量和宏观研究。为识别搭接接头的性能，进行了机械强度测试和宏观检验。基于实验研究，在 Abaqus FEM 程序中建立了所分析搭接接头的离散模型。对激光焊接过程进行了模拟计算。获得的模拟结果作为进一步数值强度分析的输入数据。为验证数值模型，将获得的结果与实验数据进行了比较。

infographic.key_insight: 激光焊接深度显著影响搭接接头强度，因此经校准的 FEM 模型可根据工艺参数预测接头质量。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究通过将熔深、实测强度和基于模拟的预测联系起来，为激光焊接不锈钢搭接接头的工艺设计提供支持。
method: 采用 X5CrNi18-10 钢板（100×200×2 mm）制备搭接接头试样。
在两种熔深水平下进行激光焊接：完全熔透和部分熔透。
测量机械强度并检查焊缝宏观组织，随后建立 Abaqus FEM 离散模型并与实验结果进行验证。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了对完全熔透和部分熔透接头的实验强度测试与宏观检验，并将数值模拟结果与实验数据直接比较以进行验证。
infographic.watch_item: 该模型仅针对这种特定不锈钢搭接接头的两种焊接深度情况进行了验证，因此其对其他几何形状、材料或参数范围的广泛适用性仍需进一步确认。

title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene
authors: A. Alhourani, I. Barsoum, J. Sheikh-Ahmad, S. Deveci
abstract: Friction stir welding (FSW) has gained recognition as an effective technique for joining thermoplastic materials. This study presents a comprehensive investigation to predict FSW characteristics such as weld temperatures, vertical axial forces, material flow and defect formation in FSW of high-density polyethylene (HDPE) using both computational and machine learning approaches, validated by experimental results. A three-dimensional Coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) numerical model is developed to simulate the HDPE welding process under varying process parameters of rotational and welding speeds, and bottom preheating conditions. The CEL numerical model is validated against experimental data, showing markedly good agreement in predicting void formation, thermal and mechanical responses. Results indicate that preheating the bottom surface proved effective in reducing thermal gradients and stabilizing vertical force fluctuations. Quantitatively, bottom-surface preheating at 60 °C reduced peak plunge force from 1600 N close to 1100 N and raised peak temperatures from 70 °C (without preheat) to about 100 °C, hence smoothing through-thickness gradients and stabilizing the axial force distribution. In parallel, two multilayer perceptron artificial neural networks (ANNs) are trained on experimental data to predict temporal temperature and axial force responses with R2 between 0.91 and 0.99, demonstrating high accuracy and strong generalization across the tested FSW parameter space. The computational CEL simulations accurately predicted weld zone morphology, including stir zone, thermo-mechanically affected zone and heat-affected zone, however the combined CEL–ANN framework enables rapid generation of process maps that highlights defective and defect-free welding windows, with optimal conditions obtained at 1500 rpm and 30 mm/min with 60 °C preheating, and poor weldability observed at 1000 rpm without preheating due to wormhole formation. These findings provide process-driven design guidelines for developing robust HDPE joints and demonstrate how integrating computational modeling with machine learning enables efficient optimization, offering valuable insights into the key characteristics of the FSW process in thermoplastics and supporting its broader adoption in industrial applications.

infographic.key_insight: A coupled CEL simulation and ANN models can accurately predict weld temperature, axial force, and defect formation in HDPE friction stir welding, enabling fast identification of robust process windows.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study shows that bottom-surface preheating and moderate rotation/travel settings can reduce force fluctuations, improve thermal uniformity, and prevent wormhole defects in thermoplastic joining.
method: 3D coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) model for FSW thermo-mechanics and material flow
Two multilayer perceptron ANNs trained on experimental data for temporal temperature and axial-force prediction
Process-map generation across rotational speed, welding speed, and preheating conditions
infographic.evidence_signal: The ANN models achieved high predictive accuracy with R2 values between 0.91 and 0.99, and the CEL results matched experiments for void formation, thermal response, and mechanical loading.
infographic.watch_item: The ANN and process maps are tied to the tested HDPE geometry and parameter range, so extrapolation to other tools, materials, or thicknesses should be validated experimentally.
infographic.paper_title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene

zh-Hans.title: 用于高密度聚乙烯搅拌摩擦焊焊缝质量预测的计算与机器学习建模方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 搅拌摩擦焊（FSW）已被公认为一种连接热塑性材料的有效技术。本研究采用计算方法与机器学习方法，并结合实验结果验证，对高密度聚乙烯（HDPE）搅拌摩擦焊中的焊缝温度、竖直轴向力、材料流动和缺陷形成等FSW特征进行了全面研究。建立了三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）数值模型，用于模拟在不同工艺参数——转速、焊接速度以及底部预热条件——下的HDPE焊接过程。CEL数值模型与实验数据进行了对比验证，在预测孔隙形成、热响应和力学响应方面表现出明显良好的吻合。结果表明，对底表面进行预热可有效降低热梯度并稳定竖直力波动。定量而言，底表面在60 °C下预热可将峰值下压载荷从接近1600 N降低至约1100 N，并将峰值温度从70 °C（无预热）提高到约100 °C，从而平滑厚度方向梯度并稳定轴向力分布。与此同时，基于实验数据训练了两个多层感知器人工神经网络（ANN），用于预测瞬态温度和轴向力响应，其R2介于0.91至0.99之间，表明在所测试的FSW参数空间内具有较高精度和较强泛化能力。计算CEL模拟准确预测了焊缝区形貌，包括搅拌区、热-机械影响区和热影响区；然而，CEL–ANN联合框架能够快速生成工艺图谱，突出有缺陷和无缺陷的焊接窗口，其中在1500 rpm和30 mm/min并采用60 °C预热时获得最优条件，而在1000 rpm且无预热时由于虫洞形成而观察到较差的可焊性。这些发现为开发稳健的HDPE接头提供了面向工艺的设计指导，并展示了将计算建模与机器学习相结合如何实现高效优化，为理解热塑性材料FSW过程的关键特征提供了有价值的见解，并支持其在工业应用中的更广泛采用。

infographic.key_insight: 耦合CEL模拟与ANN模型可以准确预测HDPE搅拌摩擦焊中的焊接温度、轴向力和缺陷形成，从而快速识别稳健的工艺窗口。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 研究表明，底表面预热以及中等转速/行进速度设置可以降低力波动、改善热均匀性，并防止热塑性材料连接中的虫洞缺陷。
method: 用于FSW热-力学与材料流动的三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）模型
两个基于实验数据训练的多层感知器ANN，用于瞬态温度和轴向力预测
在转速、焊接速度和预热条件范围内生成工艺图谱
infographic.evidence_signal: ANN模型取得了很高的预测精度，R2值介于0.91至0.99之间，且CEL结果与实验在孔隙形成、热响应和机械载荷方面一致。
infographic.watch_item: ANN和工艺图谱仅适用于所测试的HDPE几何形状和参数范围，因此推广到其他工具、材料或厚度时应通过实验进行验证。

title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images
authors: Ata Jahangir Moshayedi, Amir Sohail Khan, Ming Jun Zhang, Shuxin Yang, David Bassir
abstract: Weld defect detection plays a central role in pipeline inspection because it directly influences structural reliability and operational safety.Conventional manual inspection methods suffer from several limitations, including high labor demands, subjective judgment, and inconsistent results, which restrict their effectiveness in large-scale industrial applications. To overcome these challenges, this study evaluates the use of the lightweight convolutional neural network MobileNetV3, considering both its Small and Large configurations, for automatic multi-class classification of pipeline weld defects.The proposed approach integrates image preprocessing and data augmentation with a lightweight deep learning architecture to extract discriminative visual features from weld images. Experimental validation is carried out using two datasets acquired under practical inspection conditions. The AI5083 dataset contains 4,927 images captured using HDR cameras, while the PWDID dataset includes 78 images collected with a mobile phone camera in uncontrolled environments.The experimental results demonstrate strong classification performance, achieving an accuracy of 99.99% on the AI5083 dataset and improved results on the PWDID dataset. Compared with previously reported methods, the proposed approach yields an accuracy improvement of approximately 3%, indicating its robustness across different acquisition settings. In addition to its high accuracy, MobileNetV3 offers fast inference, low memory consumption, and reduced power requirements. Owing to these characteristics and ias compatibility with deployment frameworks such as TensorFlow Lite, ONNX, and CoreML, MobileNetV3 is well suited for mobile and handheld inspection tools. Based on these findings, the use of MobileNetV3 and other modern lightweight architectures along with denoised function are recommended for practical, on device pipeline weld defect inspection systems.

infographic.key_insight: MobileNetV3 can classify pipeline weld defects with very high accuracy while remaining lightweight enough for on-device inspection.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This makes automated weld inspection more practical for field deployment on mobile or handheld tools where speed, power, and memory are constrained.
method: Preprocess and augment noisy RGB weld images.
Train and compare MobileNetV3 Small and Large for multi-class defect classification.
Evaluate on two practical datasets with different capture conditions.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports 99.99% accuracy on AI5083 and improved performance on the smaller, uncontrolled PWDID dataset, with about a 3% gain over prior methods.
infographic.watch_item: The very small PWDID dataset and strong dependence on image quality mean real-world robustness should be confirmed across broader lighting, camera, and site conditions.
infographic.paper_title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images

zh-Hans.title: 用于管道焊接缺陷检测的 MobileNetV3：面向噪声 RGB 图像的计算机视觉方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊接缺陷检测在管道检查中占据核心地位，因为它直接影响结构可靠性和运行安全。传统人工检测方法存在多种局限，包括劳动需求高、判断带有主观性以及结果不一致，这些因素限制了其在大规模工业应用中的有效性。为克服这些挑战，本研究评估了轻量级卷积神经网络 MobileNetV3 的应用，分别考虑其 Small 和 Large 两种配置，用于管道焊缝缺陷的自动多类别分类。所提出的方法将图像预处理和数据增强与轻量级深度学习架构相结合，以从焊缝图像中提取具有判别性的视觉特征。实验验证基于两个在实际检测条件下采集的数据集进行。AI5083 数据集包含 4,927 张使用 HDR 相机拍摄的图像，而 PWDID 数据集包含 78 张在非受控环境下使用手机相机采集的图像。实验结果表明，该方法具有很强的分类性能，在 AI5083 数据集上达到 99.99% 的准确率，并在 PWDID 数据集上取得了更优结果。与先前报道的方法相比，所提出的方法准确率提升约 3%，表明其在不同采集设置下具有鲁棒性。除高准确率外，MobileNetV3 还具有推理速度快、内存占用低和功耗较低等优点。鉴于这些特性及其与 TensorFlow Lite、ONNX 和 CoreML 等部署框架的兼容性，MobileNetV3 非常适用于移动式和手持式检测工具。基于这些发现，建议在实际的端侧管道焊接缺陷检测系统中采用 MobileNetV3 及其他现代轻量级架构，并结合去噪功能。

infographic.key_insight: MobileNetV3 能够以极高准确率对管道焊接缺陷进行分类，同时仍足够轻量，适用于端侧检测。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得自动化焊缝检测在移动或手持工具上的现场部署更加可行，因为此类场景对速度、功耗和内存都有约束。
method: 对含噪 RGB 焊缝图像进行预处理和数据增强。
训练并比较用于多类别缺陷分类的 MobileNetV3 Small 和 Large。
在两个具有不同采集条件的实际数据集上进行评估。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了在 AI5083 数据集上达到 99.99% 的准确率，并且在较小、非受控的 PWDID 数据集上表现提升，较之前方法约提高 3%。
infographic.watch_item: PWDID 数据集规模很小且高度依赖图像质量，因此仍需在更广泛的光照、相机和现场条件下验证其实际鲁棒性。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep learning model can predict laser welding penetration state, penetration depth, and weld seam morphology directly from weld-pool images plus process parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables in-situ weld quality monitoring and faster quality control decisions for laser penetration welding systems without relying solely on destructive inspection.
method: Uses a CMOS camera to capture top weld-pool images during welding.
Combines convolutional neural networks with state-space models to extract spatial-temporal features.
Trains a multi-task framework with welding parameters and a carefully constructed dataset for robustness.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, the model achieved 99.35% penetration-state accuracy, 1.79 mm penetration-depth error, and 95.65% weld cross-section reconstruction accuracy.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on camera quality, weld-process consistency, and the representativeness of the constructed dataset when deployed on new welding setups.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 一种用于预测激光焊接中熔深和形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光深熔焊中，对熔深状态和焊缝形貌的评估在决定焊接质量方面起着至关重要的作用。本文对一种创新的多任务深度学习模型进行了全面介绍，该模型能够高精度预测熔深状态、熔深以及焊缝形貌。该监测平台依赖于在激光焊接过程中使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从顶部熔池图像中提取的时空特征与焊接参数相结合，建立了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种用于构建数据集的可靠方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集验证结果表明，熔深状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝横截面重建准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光深熔焊系统的原位质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 多任务时空深度学习模型可直接根据熔池图像和工艺参数预测激光焊接的熔深状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得激光深熔焊系统能够进行原位焊接质量监测，并在不完全依赖破坏性检测的情况下更快地做出质量控制决策。
method: 使用CMOS相机在焊接过程中采集顶部熔池图像。
结合卷积神经网络和状态空间模型提取时空特征。
利用焊接参数和精心构建的数据集训练多任务框架，以提高鲁棒性。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，模型实现了99.35%的熔深状态准确率、1.79毫米的熔深误差以及95.65%的焊缝横截面重建准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 在新焊接装置上部署时，性能可能取决于相机质量、焊接过程一致性以及所构建数据集的代表性。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: A transfer-learning and hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász optimization upgrade makes BiSeNetV2 much more robust to reflective welding scenes without adding model complexity.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a lightweight, real-time seam segmentation solution for construction welding robots operating under harsh illumination and specular metal reflections.
method: Fine-tuned a BiSeNetV2 backbone with transfer learning.
Used a hybrid Cross-Entropy + Lovász loss to improve boundary and overlap learning.
Kept FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed unchanged versus the baseline.
infographic.evidence_signal: The proposed method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 points over the OHEM baseline and recovering 96.33% of severe zero-IoU failure cases.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains are shown on reflective welding conditions, so deployment should still be validated across different metal types, lighting setups, and camera configurations.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强施工自动焊接机器人的焊缝分割：应对双边分割网络的局限性
zh-Hans.abstract: 在施工场景中的自主机器人焊接中，可靠的焊缝分割至关重要；然而，恶劣照明、镜面反射以及细长焊缝几何形态常会降低分割性能。本研究提出一种抗反射的焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合 Cross-Entropy--Lovász 损失增强 BiSeNetV2 骨干网络。所提出的框架并未增加架构复杂度，而是通过面向学习稳定性的优化提升反射鲁棒性。实验结果表明，所提方法取得了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，相比基于 OHEM 的基线，Joint IoU 提升了 22.36 个百分点，同时保持了相同的 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度。所提方法还在反射条件下恢复了 96.33% 的严重 zero-IoU 失败样本。针对 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 的对比实验进一步表明，所提出的优化策略对于轻量级实时分割架构尤其有效。定性分析也显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和反射鲁棒性均有所提升。这些结果表明，所提出的框架为涉及反射性金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 通过迁移学习和混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 优化升级，BiSeNetV2 在不增加模型复杂度的情况下，对反射性焊接场景的鲁棒性显著增强。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为在恶劣照明和金属镜面反射条件下运行的施工焊接机器人提供了一种轻量级、实时的焊缝分割解决方案。
method: 使用迁移学习对 BiSeNetV2 骨干网络进行微调。
采用混合 Cross-Entropy + Lovász 损失以提升边界和重叠学习能力。
与基线相比，保持 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度不变。
infographic.evidence_signal: 所提方法取得了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，相比 OHEM 基线，Joint IoU 提高了 22.36 个百分点，并恢复了 96.33% 的严重 zero-IoU 失败样本。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升是在反射性焊接条件下展示的，因此部署时仍应在不同金属类型、光照设置和相机配置下进行验证。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation model with gradual source domain expansion can transfer weld penetration state prediction across very different welding processes, including TIG and laser welding.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This reduces the need for costly relabeling when deploying intelligent weld monitoring to new processes and improves robustness under process-to-process domain shift.
method: Train a UDA classifier for penetration-state recognition across source and target welding domains.
Use gradual source domain expansion to widen source coverage during adaptation.
Evaluate same-process and cross-process transfer between TIG and laser datasets.
infographic.evidence_signal: The method achieved 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process tests, and 80.48% TIG→Laser plus 81.13% Laser→TIG in cross-process transfer, outperforming the supervised baseline by about 35.8% to 43.4%.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on the similarity and quality of the available unlabeled target data, so further validation is needed before deployment to other welding setups or sensing conditions.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 基于激光和TIG焊接中无监督域适应的跨工艺焊接熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督深度学习已被广泛用于焊缝熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在具有不同物理机理的焊接工艺之间迁移时，例如从以电弧为主的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊迁移到基于小孔效应的激光焊，其性能往往会因域偏移而显著下降。为克服这一局限，我们提出一种集成渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督域适应（UDA）框架。在专门构建的TIG和激光焊数据集上评估后，我们的方法在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高准确率。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，它在TIGFH和LSPS上的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，相比监督基线分别提高了35.83%和38.87%。更值得注意的是，在跨工艺场景中，它在TIG到Laser以及Laser到TIG的迁移中分别达到80.48%和81.13%，较基线提升了43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了该模型在保持可分辨类别边界的同时学习到了域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重新标注成本，并增强了不同焊接系统之间智能监测的通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 一种结合渐进式源域扩展的无监督域适应模型，能够在非常不同的焊接工艺之间迁移焊缝熔深状态预测，包括TIG焊和激光焊。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这减少了将智能焊缝监测部署到新工艺时对高成本重新标注的需求，并提高了对工艺间域偏移的鲁棒性。
method: 训练一个UDA分类器，用于跨源域和目标焊接域的熔深状态识别。
采用渐进式源域扩展，在适应过程中扩大源域覆盖范围。
在TIG和激光数据集之间评估同工艺和跨工艺迁移。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法在同工艺测试中于TIGFH和LSPS上分别达到90.65%和90.72%，在跨工艺迁移中TIG→Laser和Laser→TIG分别达到80.48%和81.13%，较监督基线大约提升35.8%至43.4%。
infographic.watch_item: 性能取决于可用未标注目标数据的相似性和质量，因此在部署到其他焊接装置或传感条件之前仍需进一步验证。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: D-gun deposited Al2O3-TiO2 coating significantly improves the tribological wear resistance of Ti-6Al-4V, and random forest best predicts wear from test conditions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This work supports using thermal-sprayed ceramic coatings to extend the service life of titanium alloy components in aerospace, biomedical, and marine applications.
method: Applied ~200 µm Al2O3-TiO2 coating on Ti-6Al-4V using detonation gun spray.
Evaluated wear with ASTM G99 pin-on-disc tests at 40–100 N, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min against EN31 steel.
Built ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from sliding parameters.
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM observations showed reduced wear and a protective tribo-layer on coated samples, while random forest gave the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error among the tested models.
infographic.watch_item: The machine-learning results appear based on a limited experimental range, so broader validation is needed before using the model for new operating conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Ti-6Al-4V合金上Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun涂层的摩擦学增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V合金广泛用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用。本研究通过实验和机器学习方法，研究了Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层与未涂层Ti-6Al-4V合金的摩擦学行为。采用受控条件下的爆炸喷涂（detonation gun，D-gun）工艺，在Ti-6Al-4V合金上沉积了约200 µm厚的Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层（氧气流量：4800 SLPH，乙炔：2150 SLPH，喷距：180 mm，颗粒速度约1200 m/s）。按照ASTM G99标准，使用销-盘磨损试验机测试样品的磨损行为。试验在40–100 N的法向载荷、100–200 rpm的滑动速度以及20–40 min的持续时间下，针对EN31钢对偶表面进行。扫描电子显微镜表明，涂层表面磨损降低，并形成了保护性摩擦层。建立了人工神经网络、K近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，以基于滑动参数预测磨损。随机森林在平均百分比误差和均方误差更低的情况下，被证明是最佳选择。结果表明，D-gun沉积的Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层提高了Ti-6Al-4V的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: D-gun沉积的Al2O3-TiO2涂层显著提高了Ti-6Al-4V的摩擦磨损抗力，且随机森林最能根据试验条件预测磨损。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 本研究支持采用热喷涂陶瓷涂层来延长航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用中钛合金部件的服役寿命。
method: 使用爆炸喷涂法在Ti-6Al-4V上沉积约200 µm厚的Al2O3-TiO2涂层。
按照ASTM G99销-盘试验，在40–100 N、100–200 rpm和20–40 min条件下，以EN31钢为对偶体评估磨损。
建立ANN、KNN和随机森林模型，基于滑动参数预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM观察显示涂层样品的磨损减少并形成了保护性摩擦层，而随机森林在所测试模型中具有最低的平均百分比误差和均方误差。
infographic.watch_item: 机器学习结果似乎基于有限的实验范围，因此在用于新的工况条件前需要更广泛的验证。

title: High-temperature oxidation kinetics and microstructural evolution of detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings
authors: Xinran Li, Yi-Xiang Wang, Maxingwang Lu, Yongchao Fang
abstract: To solve the susceptibility of TC4 titanium alloys to high-temperature oxidation and subsequent performance degradation, AlCuFe quasicrystalline (QC) coatings were successfully fabricated via detonation spraying (DS) as a functional protective barrier. The oxidation kinetics, phase evolution, and mechanical stability of the coating system were systematically investigated at 450°C in an atmospheric environment for up to 250 h. The results indicate that the oxidation kinetics strictly obey the parabolic growth law, yielding a steady-state parabolic rate constant ( k p ) of 1.83 × 10 −2 mg 2 ⋅ cm −4 ⋅ h −1 . Throughout the service period, the coating exhibits a significant “thermal hardening” effect, with the surface microhardness increasing from an initial 491 HV 0.2 to a final value of 665.2 HV 0.2 (a 35.5% increment). Phase evolution is characterized by an initial thermally induced ordering of metastable regions (0–3 h) followed by the gradual decomposition of the icosahedral (I) phase into approximant phases (β, τ, and λ) driven by the Al-depletion effect. Notably, the increased density of phase boundaries and intermetallic interfaces within the multi-phase network effectively sustains the mechanical performance despite the decline in the primary QC fraction. This study demonstrates that DS-AlCuFe coatings provide a reliable structural evolution pathway for the long-term high-temperature protection of titanium alloys.

infographic.key_insight: Detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings form a thermally hardened, oxidation-resistant barrier at 450°C, even as the original icosahedral phase gradually transforms into intermetallic approximants.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The coating offers a promising protective layer for TC4 titanium alloys in long-term high-temperature service where oxidation-driven degradation is a concern.
method: Detonation-sprayed AlCuFe QC coating fabricated on TC4 substrate
Aged in air at 450°C for up to 250 h
Tracked oxidation kinetics, phase evolution, and microhardness
infographic.evidence_signal: Oxidation followed a parabolic law with kp = 1.83 × 10^-2 mg^2·cm^-4·h^-1, while surface hardness increased from 491 HV0.2 to 665.2 HV0.2 after 250 h.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on phase evolution and Al depletion during service, so long-term stability beyond 250 h and in more severe environments still needs verification.
infographic.paper_title: High-temperature oxidation kinetics and microstructural evolution of detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings

zh-Hans.title: 爆轰喷涂 AlCuFe 准晶涂层的高温氧化动力学与微观结构演变
zh-Hans.abstract: 为解决 TC4 钛合金对高温氧化及随后的性能退化的敏感性，采用爆轰喷涂（DS）成功制备了 AlCuFe 准晶（QC）涂层，作为一种功能性保护屏障。在大气环境下于 450°C 条件下对该涂层体系的氧化动力学、相演化和力学稳定性进行了最长 250 h 的系统研究。结果表明，氧化动力学严格遵循抛物线生长定律，得到稳态抛物线速率常数（kp）为 1.83 × 10−2 mg2⋅cm−4⋅h−1。在整个服役期间，涂层表现出显著的“热硬化”效应，表面显微硬度由初始的 491 HV0.2 增加到最终的 665.2 HV0.2（提升 35.5%）。相演化特征表现为：首先在初期（0–3 h）发生热诱导的亚稳区有序化，随后在 Al 贫化效应驱动下，二十面体（I）相逐渐分解为近似相（β、τ 和 λ）。值得注意的是，多相网络中相界和金属间化合物界面的密度增加，即使在主要 QC 相分数下降的情况下，也能有效维持力学性能。本研究表明，DS-AlCuFe 涂层为钛合金长期高温防护提供了一条可靠的结构演化路径。

infographic.key_insight: 爆轰喷涂 AlCuFe 准晶涂层在 450°C 下形成热硬化、耐氧化的屏障，即使原始二十面体相逐渐转变为金属间化合物近似相。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该涂层为 TC4 钛合金在长期高温服役且需关注氧化驱动退化的场景中提供了一种有前景的保护层。
method: 在 TC4 基体上制备爆轰喷涂 AlCuFe 准晶涂层
在 450°C 空气中老化最长 250 h
跟踪氧化动力学、相演化和显微硬度
infographic.evidence_signal: 氧化遵循抛物线定律，kp = 1.83 × 10^-2 mg^2·cm^-4·h^-1；同时，250 h 后表面硬度由 491 HV0.2 增加到 665.2 HV0.2。
infographic.watch_item: 性能取决于服役过程中的相演化和 Al 贫化，因此仍需验证超过 250 h 的长期稳定性以及在更严苛环境下的表现。

title: Hot Corrosion Behavior of Thermal Sprayed Using HVAF and DS Techniques with Tribaloy-400 Coatings for Solar Energy Storage Container
authors: P. Sakthivel, G. Sivakumar, M. Manikandan
abstract: The present study investigates the high-temperature corrosion behaviour of Tribaloy-400 (T-400) coatings deposited on ASTM A516 steel using two thermal spray techniques: (i) High Velocity Air Fuel (HVAF) spraying and (ii) Detonation Spraying (DS). The coated specimens were exposed to a molten solar salt environment consisting of 60% NaNO 3 –40% KNO 3 at 500 °C for exposure durations up to 1000 hours to evaluate their oxidation and corrosion resistance. Phase analysis indicated the formation of stable protective oxide phases, including Cr 2 O 3 , Co 3 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , in both coating systems. Elemental mapping revealed that the HVAF coating retained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O enriched surface with minimal molten salt penetration even after prolonged exposure of 1000 hours. In contrast, the DS coating exhibited comparatively deeper salt ingress into the coating microstructure, which contributed to increased degradation and spallation. SEM observations showed that the HVAF coatings possessed a dense and well-bonded microstructure, along with the formation of thermodynamically stable oxides such as Cr 2 O 3 , CoCr 2 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , resulting in superior resistance to molten salt-induced corrosion. However, the relatively porous nature of the DS coating promoted salt-assisted oxide dissolution, leading to higher mass gain, increased spallation, and accelerated degradation during extended exposure. Comparative evaluation of both coating techniques was carried out to identify a suitable coating process and feedstock combination for high-temperature CSP applications.
venue: Journal of Materials Research and Technology

infographic.key_insight: HVAF-sprayed Tribaloy-400 forms a denser, more protective oxide barrier than detonation-sprayed coating, giving better resistance to molten solar-salt corrosion at 500 °C.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For solar thermal energy storage containers, HVAF T-400 coatings appear more suitable than DS when long-term protection against nitrate-salt attack and spallation is required.
method: Deposited Tribaloy-400 on ASTM A516 steel using HVAF and detonation spraying.
Exposed coated samples to 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 molten salt at 500 °C for up to 1000 h.
Compared phase formation, elemental mapping, SEM microstructure, and mass-gain/corrosion behavior.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that HVAF maintained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O-rich surface with minimal salt penetration, while DS showed deeper ingress, higher mass gain, and more spallation over 1000 hours.
infographic.watch_item: Results are tied to a specific salt composition and test temperature, so performance may differ under other CSP operating conditions or thermal cycling.
infographic.paper_title: Hot Corrosion Behavior of Thermal Sprayed Using HVAF and DS Techniques with Tribaloy-400 Coatings for Solar Energy Storage Container

zh-Hans.title: 采用HVAF和DS技术制备Tribaloy-400涂层用于太阳能储热容器的热腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了采用两种热喷涂技术——(i) 高速空气燃料喷涂（HVAF）和 (ii) 爆炸喷涂（DS）——在 ASTM A516 钢上沉积的 Tribaloy-400（T-400）涂层的高温腐蚀行为。将涂覆试样置于由 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 组成的熔融太阳盐环境中，在 500 °C 下暴露最长达 1000 小时，以评估其抗氧化和耐腐蚀性能。相分析表明，两种涂层体系中均形成了稳定的保护性氧化物相，包括 Cr2O3、Co3O4 和 CoMoO4。元素映射显示，即使在持续暴露 1000 小时后，HVAF 涂层仍保持均匀的富 Cr–Mo–Si–O 表面，且熔盐渗透极少。相比之下，DS 涂层表现出更深的盐进入涂层微观结构，这促进了更严重的退化和剥落。SEM 观察表明，HVAF 涂层具有致密且结合良好的微观结构，并形成了诸如 Cr2O3、CoCr2O4 和 CoMoO4 等热力学稳定氧化物，从而对熔盐诱导的腐蚀表现出更优异的抵抗能力。然而，DS 涂层相对多孔的特性促进了盐辅助的氧化物溶解，导致更高的质量增加、更多的剥落以及在长时间暴露过程中加速退化。对两种涂层技术进行了比较评估，以识别适用于高温 CSP 应用的合适涂层工艺与供料组合。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF 喷涂的 Tribaloy-400 形成了比爆炸喷涂涂层更致密、更具保护性的氧化物屏障，因此在 500 °C 下对熔融太阳盐腐蚀具有更好的抵抗能力。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于太阳能热储能容器，当需要长期抵抗硝酸盐熔盐侵蚀和剥落时，HVAF T-400 涂层似乎比 DS 更适用。
method: 采用 HVAF 和爆炸喷涂在 ASTM A516 钢上沉积 Tribaloy-400。
将涂覆样品置于 500 °C 下的 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 熔融盐中，暴露最长达 1000 h。
比较了相形成、元素映射、SEM 微观结构以及质量增重/腐蚀行为。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，HVAF 在 1000 小时内保持了均匀的富 Cr–Mo–Si–O 表面，且盐渗透极少，而 DS 则表现出更深的渗入、更高的质量增重和更多的剥落。
infographic.watch_item: 结果仅针对特定的盐组成和测试温度，因此在其他 CSP 工况或热循环条件下，其性能可能有所不同。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Changhao Yin, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba predicts future molten-pool, wire, and keyhole segmentation from past images plus process signals to compensate for welding control delay.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables more reliable real-time perception for closed-loop laser wire-feed welding, where delayed sensing can otherwise degrade control and defect prevention.
method: Physics-guided spatiotemporal state space model for lookahead segmentation
Fuses coaxial grayscale history, welding parameters, and wire-state electrical signals
Adds horizon-conditioned prediction, motion-aware decoding, and geometry/consistency losses
infographic.evidence_signal: On a 43-sequence laser welding dataset, the method achieved 74.63% mIoU at 500 ms lookahead, with ablations showing gains from temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on accurate synchronization of images, process parameters, and electrical signals; sensor drift or timing misalignment could reduce lookahead reliability.
infographic.paper_title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于激光送丝焊接中前瞻熔池分割的物理引导时空状态空间建模
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光送丝焊接中，实时焊池感知对闭环控制至关重要，而传感、计算和执行器响应会引入不可避免的延迟。本文提出一种用于前瞻焊池分割的物理引导时空状态空间网络。该模型利用历史同轴灰度图像、焊接工艺参数以及对齐的送丝状态电信号，预测三个具有物理意义区域的未来语义布局：小孔、焊丝和熔池。该方法结合了视觉编码器、工艺与传感器条件化特征归一化、补丁级时序状态空间建模、时域条件化潜在预测、稠密未来特征预测以及运动感知掩码解码器。辅助的符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏以及细粒度小孔损失进一步约束了预测几何形状和局部运动。在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 WeldMamba 在500 ms前瞻下达到74.63% mIoU。消融研究进一步表明，时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模以及小孔运动感知是实现稳健未来分割的主要贡献因素。

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba 通过将过去图像与工艺信号结合，预测未来的熔池、焊丝和小孔分割，以补偿焊接控制延迟。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得激光送丝焊接中的闭环系统能够获得更可靠的实时感知，因为延迟感知否则会降低控制效果并削弱缺陷预防能力。
method: 用于前瞻分割的物理引导时空状态空间模型
融合同轴灰度历史、焊接参数和送丝状态电信号
加入时域条件化预测、运动感知解码以及几何/一致性损失
infographic.evidence_signal: 在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上，该方法在500 ms前瞻下取得了74.63%的 mIoU，消融结果显示时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模和小孔运动感知带来性能提升。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于图像、工艺参数和电信号的准确同步；传感器漂移或时间对齐误差可能降低前瞻可靠性。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Increasing barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% made detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings denser and more wear-resistant, despite a slight rise in friction.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing spraying fill ratio is a practical way to improve the durability of protective carbide coatings for high-wear, high-temperature machine components.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical conditions.
Microstructure and phases were examined using microscopy and X-ray diffraction.
Tribological behavior was measured in dry ball-on-disc tests at 10 and 15 N and 5 and 10 cm/s.
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% fill ratio coating showed a denser structure and achieved a minimum wear rate of 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N), indicating improved wear resistance.
infographic.watch_item: The higher-fill coating improved wear resistance but also showed a higher coefficient of friction, so tribological trade-offs should be considered for real applications.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 药筒填充比对爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层微观结构、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究探讨了药筒填充比对爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层微观结构、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，分别以43%和53%的药筒填充比制备涂层。微观结构表征表明，形成了致密的层状涂层，孔隙率较低，Cr3C2碳化物颗粒在NiCr金属基体中分布均匀。与43%药筒填充比制备的涂层相比，53%药筒填充比制备的涂层呈现出更致密的微观结构。X射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后Cr3C2和NiCr仍为主导相，而由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物发生部分脱碳，形成了少量Cr7C3。采用球-盘摩擦副在干滑动条件下评价摩擦学性能，法向载荷为10和15 N，滑动速度为5和10 cm/s。磨损体积由测试后磨痕几何形貌确定，并据此计算磨损率。53%药筒填充比制备的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更好的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数较高。最小磨损率达到1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与更低的孔隙率和更高的涂层结构完整性有关。结果表明，优化爆炸喷涂参数会显著影响涂层结构和摩擦学行为。所制备的Cr3C2–NiCr涂层有望作为在严苛摩擦和磨损条件下工作的部件的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将药筒填充比从43%提高到53%，使爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层更加致密且更耐磨，尽管摩擦略有增加。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化喷涂填充比是一种提高高磨损、高温机械部件用防护碳化物涂层耐久性的实用方法。
method: 在相同条件下，分别以43%和53%的药筒填充比制备爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层。
采用显微镜和X射线衍射分析微观结构和相组成。
在干摩擦球-盘试验中测量摩擦学行为，载荷为10和15 N，滑动速度为5和10 cm/s。
infographic.evidence_signal: 53%填充比涂层结构更致密，最小磨损率达到1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N)，表明其耐磨性有所提高。
infographic.watch_item: 较高填充比涂层虽然提高了耐磨性，但摩擦系数也更高，因此在实际应用中应考虑摩擦学权衡。

title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits
authors: Steven Camilleri, Thi Thuy Tien Tran, Keita Nomoto, Andrew Duguid, Matthew Harbidge, Riyan Rashid
abstract: Cold spray additive manufacturing (CSAM) is a solid-state process capable of producing dense metallic components without melting, making it highly attractive for copper applications requiring both electrical conductivity and mechanical integrity. In this study, the influence of spray pressure at 30 bar, 40 bar, 50 bar and 60 bar on particle velocity, microstructure, and properties of cold-sprayed copper was systematically investigated using a LightSPEE3D system. The cold spray deposits were characterised by X-ray diffraction (XRD), hardness testing, eddy current conductivity, tensile evaluation, and scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results reveal that increasing spray pressure enhances particle velocities beyond the critical threshold for copper, leading to improved inter-particle bonding and microstructural refinement consistent with severe plastic deformation and possible continuous dynamic recrystallisation (cDRX)-assisted mechanisms. XRD analysis suggested progressive crystallite refinement and increased dislocation density with pressure, which directly correlated with improved ductility. While hardness decreased due to recovery and recrystallisation, electrical conductivity increased, likely due to improved inter-particle continuity and reduced interfacial discontinuities. Tensile testing showed a clear strength-ductility transition, with deposits at higher pressures exhibiting substantially improved ductility approaching bulk copper behaviour and fully ductile fracture morphologies. Overall, the findings identify an optimum processing window at higher spray pressures, where copper cold spray deposits achieve a balanced combination of conductivity, ductility, and strength. This study highlights the critical role of spray pressure in controlling the interplay between particle velocity, dynamic recrystallisation, and multifunctional performance in CSAM copper components. This study establishes a process-structure-property relationship linking particle velocity, XRD-derived microstructural evolution, conductivity, and tensile behaviour within a LightSPEE3D CSAM system.

infographic.key_insight: Higher cold-spray pressure drives copper particles faster past the bonding threshold, producing denser, more ductile deposits with better conductivity but lower hardness.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For CSAM copper parts, tuning spray pressure is a practical lever to balance electrical performance, ductility, and structural integrity in one process window.
method: Cold-sprayed copper at 30, 40, 50, and 60 bar using a LightSPEE3D system
Measured particle/material response with XRD, SEM, hardness, conductivity, and tensile tests
Compared microstructure and properties against spray pressure to identify the optimum window
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports higher-pressure deposits showed refined crystallites, increased conductivity, improved ductility, and fully ductile fracture, while hardness decreased with recovery/recrystallisation.
infographic.watch_item: The optimum pressure window is system-specific, so transfer to other nozzles, powders, or substrates should be validated before implementation.
infographic.paper_title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits

zh-Hans.title: 冷喷涂增材制造优化：压力驱动铜沉积层机械性能提升
zh-Hans.abstract: 冷喷涂增材制造（CSAM）是一种可在不熔化的情况下制备致密金属构件的固态工艺，因此对于既要求电导率又要求机械完整性的铜应用具有很强吸引力。本研究系统考察了在30 bar、40 bar、50 bar和60 bar喷涂压力下，采用LightSPEE3D系统制备的冷喷涂铜的粒子速度、显微组织和性能影响。通过X射线衍射（XRD）、硬度测试、涡流电导率测试、拉伸评估和扫描电子显微镜（SEM）对冷喷涂沉积层进行了表征。结果表明，提高喷涂压力可使粒子速度超过铜的临界阈值，从而增强颗粒间结合，并形成与严重塑性变形以及可能由连续动态再结晶（cDRX）辅助机制相一致的显微组织细化。XRD分析表明，随压力升高，晶粒尺寸逐步细化且位错密度增加，这与延性改善直接相关。尽管由于回复和再结晶，硬度有所降低，但电导率提高，这可能归因于颗粒间连续性改善和界面不连续性减少。拉伸测试显示出明显的强度-延性转变，高压力下的沉积层表现出显著改善的延性，接近块体铜的行为，并呈现完全韧性断裂形貌。总体而言，研究结果确定了较高喷涂压力下的最佳工艺窗口，在该窗口内，冷喷涂铜沉积层可实现导电性、延性和强度的平衡组合。本研究强调了喷涂压力在控制CSAM铜部件中粒子速度、动态再结晶与多功能性能相互作用方面的关键作用。本研究建立了一个工艺-组织-性能关系，将LightSPEE3D CSAM系统中的粒子速度、基于XRD的显微组织演变、导电性和拉伸行为联系起来。

infographic.key_insight: 更高的冷喷涂压力使铜颗粒以更高速度超过结合阈值，形成更致密、延性更好的沉积层，同时导电性更高，但硬度更低。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于CSAM铜部件，通过调节喷涂压力是在一个工艺窗口内平衡电性能、延性和结构完整性的实用手段。
method: 使用LightSPEE3D系统在30、40、50和60 bar下冷喷涂铜
采用XRD、SEM、硬度、导电率和拉伸测试测量颗粒/材料响应
将显微组织和性能与喷涂压力进行比较，以确定最佳工艺窗口
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告显示，高压力沉积层具有细化晶粒、更高导电率、改善的延性和完全韧性断裂，而硬度则因回复/再结晶而降低。
infographic.watch_item: 最佳压力窗口具有系统特异性，因此在应用于其他喷嘴、粉末或基材之前，应先进行验证。

title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS
authors: Dastan Buitkenov, Nurkhat Bimakhan, Nurmakhanbet Raisov
abstract: In this work, self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings based on the NiCrFeBSiC system were obtained by air plasma spraying, and their structural, mechanical, and tribological properties were investigated.. The effect of argon flow rate (1600 and 1800 L/h) during coating formation was consideredIt was found that an increase in argon flow rate leads to an approximately twofold increase in coating thickness and a twofold decrease in porosity. According to the microhardness measurement results, the microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, while the elastic modulus was 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa. Tribological tests were carried out using the ball-on-disk configurationAt an argon flow rate of 1800 L/h, the friction coefficient showed a lower value (≈0.107), indicating improved wear resistance of the coatings. Scratch test results showed a high level of adhesion between the coatings and the substrate. Although the critical load values (Lc) were similar for both regimes, the coatings obtained at 1800 L/h exhibited a more gradual and stable failure behavior.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Raising argon flow from 1600 to 1800 L/h during air plasma spraying of NiCrFeBSiC coatings produced thicker, denser, and more wear-resistant coatings.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This suggests argon flow is a practical process lever for tuning plasma-sprayed coating quality, especially when balancing deposition efficiency, porosity, and tribological performance.
method: Air plasma sprayed self-fluxing NiCrFeBSiC coatings at two argon flow rates: 1600 and 1800 L/h.
Compared the resulting microstructure, microhardness, elastic modulus, adhesion, and wear behavior.
Used ball-on-disk tribology and scratch testing to assess performance.
infographic.evidence_signal: At 1800 L/h, coating thickness increased about twofold, porosity decreased about twofold, and the friction coefficient dropped to roughly 0.107, with microhardness measured at 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV and elastic modulus at 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa.
infographic.watch_item: The study compares only two argon flow settings, so the optimal operating window and scalability to other spray conditions remain uncertain.
infographic.paper_title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS

zh-Hans.title: 空气等离子喷涂过程中氩气流量对NiCrFeBSiC涂层结构和性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本工作采用空气等离子喷涂制备了基于NiCrFeBSiC体系的自熔性金属陶瓷涂层，并研究了其结构、力学和摩擦学性能。考察了涂层形成过程中氩气流量（1600和1800 L/h）的影响。结果表明，随着氩气流量增加，涂层厚度约增加一倍，孔隙率降低一半。根据显微硬度测试结果，显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。采用球-盘配置进行了摩擦学测试。在1800 L/h的氩气流量下，摩擦系数较低（≈0.107），表明涂层耐磨性得到改善。划痕测试结果表明涂层与基体之间具有较高的结合强度。尽管两种工况下的临界载荷值（Lc）相近，但在1800 L/h条件下获得的涂层表现出更为渐进和稳定的失效行为。

infographic.key_insight: 将空气等离子喷涂NiCrFeBSiC涂层时的氩气流量从1600提高到1800 L/h，可获得更厚、更致密且更耐磨的涂层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明氩气流量是调控等离子喷涂涂层质量的一个实用工艺参数，尤其适用于在沉积效率、孔隙率和摩擦学性能之间进行平衡。
method: 在两种氩气流量条件下采用空气等离子喷涂制备自熔性NiCrFeBSiC涂层：1600和1800 L/h。
比较所得涂层的显微组织、显微硬度、弹性模量、结合强度和磨损行为。
采用球-盘摩擦学测试和划痕测试评估性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在1800 L/h条件下，涂层厚度约增加一倍，孔隙率约降低一半，摩擦系数降至约0.107；显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。
infographic.watch_item: 该研究仅比较了两种氩气流量设置，因此最佳工艺窗口以及向其他喷涂条件的可扩展性仍不确定。
